title: Glowing Ore +
description: Makes ores glow in vanilla!                        (Optifine is not required)
body:
### GLOWING ORE +

Glowing ore for help cave diving and quickly getting resources. You will never miss an ore agin!
Optifine if not needed! Works in vanilla!

![Glowing ore in a cave.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2215f8f6bfe8fad818c0e33c514b9c31428e2c00_0.webp)
